title: MTSuggestions
description: The easiest way to keep in touch with your players and bring them the features they want!
body: Full transcript MTSuggestions Intuitive Interface Whether a player wants to report a simple bug, or a full lore rewrite, the interface remains intuitive. Simple interface allows players to write suggestions, either through multiple messages or directly from the command! Instant Feedback Players receive immediate feedback on their suggestions The plugin will keep players up to date on their suggestions! Admins have a simple interface to work through! Discord Integration The server will keep everyone up to date through discord webhooks For any of the actions the plugin executes, simple and customizable discord notifications are sent! Performance Whether you are using it for a small SMP or a giant setup, it stays reliable. Using simple webhooks instead of a full discord bot allows the plugin to stay lightweight and quick!
